Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Guild]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 1''' — The Guild has a new client.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 3''' — The Guild is the only force capable of crossing the Aion Sea at will.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 19''' — The Guild must provide an official order to release prisoners.}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 6''' — The Navigator's ship belonged to the Guild.}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 4''' — The Guild only has three combat-capable Soulbound.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 6''' — The Guild would likely want the children to stay quiet.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 20''' — Shera worked on behalf of the Guild.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 21''' — Pardoning Lucan and Shera would have split the Guild against Yala.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 22''' — The Guild provides care for Ayana.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 24''' — The Testament is the fastest ship in the Guild.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
